name: Enterprise Professional
description: A business professional managing agreements, delegations, and compliance workflows. Values trust, security, and streamlined processes. Expects polished, reliable interfaces with minimal learning curve.
deal_breakers: Casual or unprofessional language in business contexts
Unclear security or data handling practices
Complex workflows with no guided onboarding
Missing audit trails or accountability features
Poor error handling or confusing error messages
accessibility_needs: Consistent design patterns across all screens
evaluation_prompt: An enterprise user trusts tools that look reliable and behave predictably. If the interface feels experimental or unpolished, they'll question the entire platform's credibility. Security and professionalism are non-negotiable.
